overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt trail through grassy terrain at night in a video game, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The player approaches a stand of twin trees on a hillside, passing a wire cage trap on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with abandoned trap

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, flashlight illuminating the grass and path ahead

entered.detail: metal wire trap or cage sitting in the grass on the left side of the path
two dark trees silhouetted against the night sky on the hill ahead
narrow dirt path winding through tall grass
tall green grass covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dark dirt trail through grassy terrain, illuminated by a flashlight. A wire cage trap sits on the left side of the path, while two trees are visible in the distance atop the hill.

agents.ego_description: continuing up the incline toward the twin trees, flashlight beam sweeping across the path

entered.detail: light-colored rock or tree stump visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Continuing up the hillside trail, the wire trap falls behind as the twin trees grow larger and closer. A rock formation becomes visible on the right as the path approaches the tree stand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark hillside trail that leads from a lonely trap toward a distant stand of trees. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness of a grassy dirt path, passing a wire cage trap positioned on the left. As the camera ascends the hill, the trap recedes into the shadows while the two distant trees grow larger and more prominent in the beam of light. The scene then shifts to reveal a rock formation appearing on the right as the path narrows. Finally, the movement culminates as the camera closes the distance to the twin trees atop the rise.
